overall.description: Static first-person view from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a luxury apartment bedroom with a large window overlooking a hazy, orange-lit cityscape at dusk. The camera remains completely stationary as a television cycles through various futuristic advertisements, glitch effects, and abstract patterns. The room features cyberpunk aesthetics with neon accents, wood slat ceilings, and modern furnishings.

scene_state.functional_zone: luxury cyberpunk apartment bedroom with city view

television shifts to colorful abstract geometric patterns and rainbow color bars

large flatscreen TV displaying cycling cyberpunk advertisements and glitch effects

glowing pink neon sign on the wall behind the television
open magazine or book resting on the bed sheets

segments.scene_description: The scene presents a static first-person view of a luxurious cyberpunk apartment bedroom during a hazy dusk. Through the large window, an orange-tinted cityscape glows behind blinds, while the interior features a messy bed in the foreground and a wood-slatted ceiling above. A television dominates the right side of the frame, continuously cycling through futuristic advertisements, digital glitches, and abstract visual patterns. The environment is devoid of people, creating an atmospheric, solitary mood typical of the Cyberpunk 2077 setting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a static first-person perspective within a luxury cyberpunk bedroom as the atmosphere shifts through a cycle of digital transmissions. It begins with a view of a messy bed and a wood-slatted ceiling, while a hazy, orange-tinted cityscape glows softly behind window blinds in the background. As the camera remains fixed, the focus settles on a television to the right that continuously transforms the room's mood by cycling through futuristic advertisements. The scene then shifts through a series of rapid digital glitches and abstract visual patterns that flicker across the screen. Finally, the environment settles into a solitary, atmospheric stillness, defined by the contrast between the quiet interior and the glowing urban sprawl outside.
